profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Legibility is the first medicine. When someone understands, fear shrinks.
profile.working_on: Reworking hospital intake so a terrified child reads what's about to happen in language that calms instead of compounds fear.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep compassion, striving to transform anxiety into understanding, believing that clarity can empower even the most vulnerable.
